languages.text: "Это лишь иллюзия, созданная для того, чтобы отвлечь вас от истины. Не рекомендую тратить на нее время".
"It is merely an illusion intended to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time on it."
languages.original_text: "Это лишь иллюзия, созданная для того, чтобы отвлечь вас от истины. Не рекомендую тратить на нее время".

traits.locale_text: "It's just an illusion meant to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time."
"It's just an illusion meant to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time."
"It is merely an illusion intended to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time on it."
"It is merely an illusion intended to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time on it."

languages.text: «Es solo una ilusión creada para distraerle de la verdad. No pierda el tiempo con ella».
languages.original_text: "It is merely an illusion intended to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time on it."

traits.locale_text: «Es solo una ilusión creada para distraerle de la verdad. No pierda el tiempo con ella».

languages.text: “那不过是让人忽视真相的幻觉而已。别把时间浪费在上面。”
languages.original_text: "It is merely an illusion intended to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time on it."

traits.locale_text: “那不过是让人忽视真相的幻觉而已。别把时间浪费在上面。”

languages.text: "Das ist nur eine Illusion, die Euch von der Wahrheit ablenken soll. Vergeudet Eure Zeit nicht damit."
languages.original_text: "It is merely an illusion intended to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time on it."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist nur eine Illusion, die Euch von der Wahrheit ablenken soll. Vergeudet Eure Zeit nicht damit."

languages.text: « Ce n'est qu'une illusion visant à vous détourner de la vérité. Ne perdez pas votre temps avec ça. »
languages.original_text: "It is merely an illusion intended to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time on it."

traits.locale_text: « Ce n'est qu'une illusion visant à vous détourner de la vérité. Ne perdez pas votre temps avec ça. »

languages.text: "Bu, yalnızca sizi gerçekten uzaklaştırmayı amaçlayan bir illüzyon. Bunun için zamanınızı boşa harcamayın."
languages.original_text: "It is merely an illusion intended to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time on it."

traits.locale_text: "Bu, yalnızca sizi gerçekten uzaklaştırmayı amaçlayan bir illüzyon. Bunun için zamanınızı boşa harcamayın."

languages.text: 「それは真実から気をそらすための幻影に過ぎません。そのことに時間を費やすのは無駄です。」
languages.original_text: "It is merely an illusion intended to distract you from the truth. Don't waste your time on it."

traits.locale_text: 「それは真実から気をそらすための幻影に過ぎません。そのことに時間を費やすのは無駄です。」
